<insights>

- High cohesion (0.96) — files are tightly interconnected
- Acts as the shared dependency for both `web` and `web-3`, so documenting its stable component API will prevent tight coupling.
- Schema validators live alongside UI primitives; consider splitting validation logic into a sibling folder to reduce bundle churn.
- Despite modest coupling (0.04), watcher tests should ensure changes in shared constants/themes don’t regress dependent zones.
- This zone is the central dependency hub for schema definitions and reusable components, feeding both server and advanced viewer flows.
- Schemas and visual primitives cohabitate; separating data validation from UI would yield clearer ownership and faster builds.
- As other zones import these components, add contract tests or Storybook docs to guard against breaking API or theme surface changes.
- [call graph] 811 internal calls, 1 outgoing, 0 incoming (cohesion: 1, coupling: 0)

</insights>
